---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who does it help?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Be specific — which part of the app would change (main process, renderer, settings, etc.)?

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

Any screenshots, mockups, or examples from other tools that illustrate the idea.
